items.title: Barcelona beat Bayern to reach Women's Champions League final
items.summary: Barcelona beat Bayern Munich 4-2 at the Nou Camp to win their semi-final tie 5-3 on aggregate to advance to the Women's Champions League final where they will face Lyon.
